description: Add NOT NULL field validation to all controller INSERT operations - Batch 2 (operations/scheduling/HR controllers). Add validation checks at the top of each handler function that performs an INSERT, returning HTTP 400 with a descriptive error message listing which fields are required.
steps: Fix activities.controller.ts: createActivity needs name. createSession needs activity_id, session_date, start_time. addParticipant needs resident_id (already validates session but not resident_id from body).
Fix schedule.controller.ts: upsertShift needs staffId, shiftDate, shiftType.
Fix billing.controller.ts: createInvoice needs residentId, periodStart, periodEnd, amountPence, payerName.
Fix visitors.controller.ts: signInVisitor needs visitorName, visitorType, visitingResidentId, purpose. addSafeguardingFlag needs visitorName, restrictionType, reason.
Fix fireLog.controller.ts: recordFireTest needs testType, testDate. recordEquipmentCheck needs equipmentType, location, checkDate. createPeep needs residentId, mobilityStatus, evacuationMethod.

Fix recruitment.controller.ts: createJobPosting needs title, department, contractType. createApplication needs jobPostingId, applicantName, applicantEmail. scheduleInterview needs applicationId, scheduledAt. createDbsCheck needs personName, dbsType.
Fix staffCosts.controller.ts: recordStaffCost needs staffId, periodStart, periodEnd, basicHours, basicCostPence. createBudget needs budgetMonth, budgetPence.
Fix roomTurnover.controller.ts: createRoomTurnover needs roomNumber, vacatedDate. addChecklistItem needs turnover_id, taskName.
Fix smartRota.controller.ts: already has validation for createTemplate - SKIP. But check generateShifts.
Fix occupancy.controller.ts: recordOccupancy needs recordDate, totalBeds, occupiedBeds. addForecast needs forecastDate, predictedOccupancyPct.
acceptance_criteria: activities.controller.ts createActivity returns 400 if name is missing
schedule.controller.ts upsertShift returns 400 if staffId, shiftDate, or shiftType is missing
billing.controller.ts createInvoice returns 400 for missing required fields
visitors.controller.ts signInVisitor returns 400 if visitorName is missing
fireLog.controller.ts all INSERT handlers return 400 for missing required fields
recruitment.controller.ts all INSERT handlers return 400 for missing required fields
Running npm run build in backend/ succeeds with no TypeScript errors
findings: All 9 controller files updated with validation. The user's steering message also showed a null constraint violation in absence.controller.ts (staff_id null on INSERT into absence_records) which is not covered by this feature's scope. The smartRota controller was skipped per instructions as it already has validation.
